tests: pytest tests/ -> 209 passed, 3 failed (pre-existing Windows UnicodeDecodeError in test_gems::test_gem_upgrade_recipe_exists, test_item_bases_manual::{test_item_base_monarch, test_item_base_phase_blade}). Same 3 as previous runs. Not a regression.

questions_processed.question: Early Hell Warlock: magic vs demon vs echoing strike
questions_processed.improvement_notes: Intent misclassified as runeword_recipe (keyword 'runewords' in question). Added class-name+build-context heuristic to prefer build_advice. Added 2 strategy cards: early-hell warlock build comparison + ES+Hephasto farming guide. Increased strategy_cards limit from 2 to 4.

questions_processed.question: Left over skill points - bind demon worth it for magic warlock?
questions_processed.improvement_notes: First run surfaced ES skill allocations but missed the emphatic community consensus. Added strategy card for 1-point Bind Demon investment (bind demon + demon mastery + blood oath = 3 points total for massive impact).

questions_processed.question: Void runeword completion - looking for +3 Abyss dagger base
questions_processed.improvement_notes: search_runewords() was returning Hand of Justice/Brand/Fortitude instead of Void because common words (and/for/just) matched as substrings. Added stop-word filtering + punctuation stripping. Void now correctly ranks #1.

review_instructions: Human review: (1) Check the class-name+build-context heuristic in intent_classifier.py — ensure it doesn't over-trigger on actual runeword recipe questions that happen to mention a class. (2) The stop-word list in runeword_db.py is manually curated — consider if any legitimate D2R terms got blocked. (3) New strategy cards contain community-sourced advice (ES+Hephasto, 1-pt Bind Demon) — verify D2R accuracy.
